texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Bookings will be confirmed on receipt of 30% deposit
texts.text: Bookings will be confirmed on receipt of 30% deposit

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Full payment is required 30 days prior to guest's arrival
texts.text: Full payment is required 30 days prior to guest's arrival

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · In the unfortunate event that the balance of the invoice amount is not paid within the stipulated time, LOYK MARA CAMP reserves the right to treat the reservation as cancelled.
texts.text: In the unfortunate event that the balance of the invoice amount is not paid within the stipulated time, LOYK MARA CAMP reserves the right to treat the reservation as cancelled.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Masai Mara Park entrance fees is subject to change without notice
texts.text: Masai Mara Park entrance fees is subject to change without notice

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Reservations  that  are  cancelled,  reduced  in  length  of  stay  or  reduced  in  numbers  [hereafter collectively called CANCELLATION] are subject to cancellation and No-show fees as follows:
texts.text: Reservations  that  are  cancelled,  reduced  in  length  of  stay  or  reduced  in  numbers  [hereafter collectively called CANCELLATION] are subject to cancellation and No-show fees as follows:

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · One child 3 years and below sharing room with 1 or 2 adults will be free of charge (any extra will be charged for meals at Kes.4,000 per child)
texts.text: One child 3 years and below sharing room with 1 or 2 adults will be free of charge (any extra will be charged for meals at Kes.4,000 per child)

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Children  4 -11yrs exclusive use of own tent will pay 75% of adults sharing rate
texts.text: Children  4 -11yrs exclusive use of own tent will pay 75% of adults sharing rate

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · One child sharing with one adult. (Adult single room rate and child rate above).
texts.text: One child sharing with one adult. (Adult single room rate and child rate above).

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Children (4 -11yrs) in Family tent pays 75% of adult sharing.
texts.text: Children (4 -11yrs) in Family tent pays 75% of adult sharing.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Release period 60 days from date of reservation.
texts.text: Release period 60 days from date of reservation.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Low and Mid seasons shall herein be referred to as 'OFF PEAK' and High season shall be referred herein as 'PEAK'
texts.text: Low and Mid seasons shall herein be referred to as 'OFF PEAK' and High season shall be referred herein as 'PEAK'

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · TOUR LEADER -Complimentary accommodation will be granted to one bona fide Tour Leader on the basis of 1 per 15 paying clients. Tour Leader charges for groups less than 15 pax shall be charged as below:
texts.text: TOUR LEADER -Complimentary accommodation will be granted to one bona fide Tour Leader on the basis of 1 per 15 paying clients. Tour Leader charges for groups less than 15 pax shall be charged as below:
